item.title: Wordpress to Hugo
item.description:
Great text from Christopher Kirk-Nielsen about how to convert blog from Wordpress to Hugo. I recommend reading this to anyone who plans to make the ‘move’ :)

WordPress has a pretty robust architecture that can feel a bit too complex to run a simple blog. @ckirknielsen sheds light on how Hugo can help you create a blog that is simple and fast.

↬ Switching From WordPress To Hugohttps://t.co/ShNqLv2Ca3 pic.twitter.com/o6MriCDR6p

— Smashing Magazine (@smashingmag) May 22, 2019

Actually, this post was published on Smashing Magazine, which happens to be also powered with Hugo. Great !

item.title: Hugo Workflow on Android
item.description:
Hugo is very versatile.

It can be used on various software environments, including Android.

item.title: Hugo 0.55.6: One Bug Fix!
item.description:
This is a bug-fix release with one important fix. There have been reports about infrequent paginator crashes when running the Hugo server since 0.55.0. The reason have been narrowed down to that of parallel rebuilds. This isn’t a new thing, but the changes in 0.55.0 made it extra important to serialize the page initialization. This release fixes that by protecting the Build method with a lock when running in server mode.

You can fetch new Hugo version as usuall or go to

https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/releases

Source: gohugo.io
